title: There's Nothing Holdin' Me Back
group_key: there's nothing holdin' me back|shawn mendes

lyrics.text: I wanna follow where she goes
lyrics.translation: 我想要跟随她 去她想去的地方

lyrics.text: I think about her and she knows it
lyrics.translation: 我时刻都在想念她 这点她心知肚明

lyrics.text: I wanna let her take control
lyrics.translation: 我真想我能好好把持这份情愫

lyrics.text: 'Cause every time that she gets close, yeah
lyrics.translation: 因为无时无刻 她总是会越靠越近

lyrics.text: She pulls me in enough to keep me guessing, mmm
lyrics.translation: 她让我深陷其中 让我不免怀疑

lyrics.text: Maybe I should stop and start confessing
lyrics.translation: 也许我应该停下我靠近的脚步 摊牌我的一切

lyrics.text: Confessing, yeah
lyrics.translation: 坦白一切

lyrics.text: Oh, I've been shaking
lyrics.translation: 哦 我战栗着

lyrics.text: I love it when you go crazy
lyrics.translation: 当你渐渐疯狂 我爱的正是你这模样

lyrics.text: You take all my inhibitions
lyrics.translation: 你让我的自制力都为你崩溃

lyrics.text: Baby, there's nothing holding me back
lyrics.translation: 亲爱的 如今再没有什么可以踌躇我的脚步

lyrics.text: You take me places that tear up my reputation
lyrics.translation: 你带我来到名声狼藉的境地

lyrics.text: Manipulate my decisions
lyrics.translation: 操控我所有选择

lyrics.text: Baby, there's nothing holding me back
lyrics.translation: 亲爱的 如今已没有什么可以阻碍我的脚步

lyrics.text: She says that she’s never afraid
lyrics.translation: 她说她永远不会害怕

lyrics.text: Just picture everybody naked
lyrics.translation: 就想象所有人都卸下伪装

lyrics.text: She really doesn't like to wait
lyrics.translation: 她不愿意等待

lyrics.text: Not really into hesitation
lyrics.translation: 绝不愿陷入犹豫

lyrics.text: 'Cause if we lost our minds and we took it way too far
lyrics.translation: 如果你我终于丢掉了最后的理智 天涯两隔

lyrics.text: I know we'd be alright, know we would be alright
lyrics.translation: 我清楚的 我们都会好好的 我们都会好好的

lyrics.text: If you were by my side and we stumbled in the dark
